title: [BUG] Exported xlsx file can't be loaded.
author: Codyooo
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

export a xlsx file from lark sheet, it can be opened in local excel software.
but can't be loaded using  workbook.xlsx.load() method.
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f5cd32b7-4506-42e2-9f5e-b177bcee76dd)

However, if I open this xlsx file in ms excel and save it, change nothing. Then it can be loaded with the lib.

I uploaded the two files, the original exported  version and the saved version.
[exported.xlsx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16432123/exported.xlsx)
[exported_copy.xlsx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16432124/exported_copy.xlsx)





```javascript

await workbook.xlsx.load(arrayBuffer, { ignoreNodes: ignoreList });
```

## The expected behaviour:

The exported file can be loaded directly instead of re saving the file in ms excel.

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript

```
